metadata.title: Catching Opponents Off-Guard with a Swift 2-Kill Play in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how quick thinking and sharp aim turn this round around. Two enemies down in seconds with smooth peeks and smart positioning.
Where’s your favorite spot to catch opponents by surprise?
Share your clutch moments below!

Drop your best clutch plays in the comments!
